title: Problems encountered when using natural right join and dataformat functions together
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(c1 Int32 NOT NULL, c2 Date DEFAULT NULL);
CREATE TABLE t3(c3 String NOT NULL, c4 Float64 DEFAULT 0.0);
INSERT INTO t3(c3, c4) VALUES ('A', 1.5), ('B', NULL), ('C', 3.0);
SELECT t2.c1, t3.c3 FROM t2 RIGHT JOIN t3 ON 1=1 WHERE (NOT (t2.c2 IS NULL));
key_bug_features: NATURAL RIGHT JOIN with DATE_FORMAT function
